Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mariala Brechess]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Mariala Brechess is a human woman suspected to be half-Aethril.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Mariala Brechess has black hair and eyes that drift as if watching the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Mariala is a student whose specialty is fortune magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Mariala Brechess is a student with half-Aethril hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Mariala Brechess is a student who uses a tablet and stylus for notes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Mariala Brechess is a student in the class.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Mariala Brechess belongs to the Brechess family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Mariala Brechess possesses fortune magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Mariala Brechess is a student who carries a blazing rod with a powerful destructive aura.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — Mariala Brechess is a young, half-Aethril woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala is a student on the shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Mariala is a student on the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Mariala is someone the narrator's students could contact.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Mariala Brechess is a mage from the Magic Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Mariala has seen the narrator's summons in action before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Mariala was present behind the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Mariala is a student and uses a wand.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — Mariala Brechess is a half-Aethril with natural sensitivity to magical currents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 9''' — Mariala is an actual wizard who passed her certification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Mariala Brechess watched the conflict on the Subline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Mariala Brechess is a mage who can see the future through Aetheric symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala can prepare spells in advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala can cast fortune spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Mariala can cast offensive spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala represents the group of six students.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala has an optical implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala pulled a mantle around her neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Mariala has never served in the Union military.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
